description_long: This object consists of two cylindrical bottles of different sizes, each equipped with a white plastic pump dispenser. Both bottles have smooth, rounded shoulders and a straight vertical body, with a white label on the front displaying text and a simple logo. The pump mechanisms are ribbed for grip and feature a curved actuator for dispensing liquid. The bottles appear to be made of dark, opaque plastic, while the pumps and caps are a contrasting white. The overall design is minimalistic and modern, suitable for personal care products such as shampoo. The labels are clean and uncluttered, with the larger bottle having a slightly taller and slimmer profile compared to the shorter, wider companion.
description: Two cylindrical shampoo bottles with white pump dispensers and minimalist white labels, one taller and one shorter, both with smooth, rounded shoulders.
description_view_0: Front view showing both bottles' white labels, pump dispensers, and the height difference between the two.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the pump mechanisms and the relative positioning of the bottles, with less label detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, dark backs of the bottles and the full shape of the pump dispensers.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the profile of the shorter bottle and the pump, with only a sliver of the label visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A stylized 'H' within a square outline is visible on the label.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: tall and cylindrical with rounded shoulders
